allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
chore: Prepare repository for public release

This commit prepares the Sailor project for public release by implementing
security best practices, cleaning up internal documentation, and adding
proper open source licensing.

## Changes Made

### Documentation
- Add MIT License \(LICENSE file\)
- Add Security Policy \(SECURITY.md\)
- Update README.md: Remove proprietary license, add MIT license badges
- Add production security warnings and best practices

### Security & Configuration
- Create .env.example files \(root and backend\) for environment variables
- Update .gitignore to exclude .claude/ directory
- Document JWT secret configuration requirements
- Add warnings about changing default credentials in production

### Cleanup
- Remove internal migration documentation files:
  - MIGRATION_FACTURA_ESTADO.md
  - MIGRATION_FACTURA_FECHAHORAPAGO.md
  - MIGRATION_PEDIDO_SIN_ENTREGADO.md
  - MIGRATION_TRAZABILIDAD_USUARIOS.md
  - FISCAL_CLIENTE_SNAPSHOT.md
- Remove internal development checklists:
  - UX_CHECKLIST_FACTURACION.md
  - UI_CHECKLIST_MENU_GRID.md
  - MENU_GRID_DESIGN.md
  - VALIDATION_SUMMARY.md
  - BUG_FIX_EXTRAS_PEDIDOS_LISTOS.md
- Remove debug shell scripts with hardcoded credentials:
  - debug_cuenta.sh
  - check_pedidos.sh
  - debug_pedido_create.sh

## Security Verification
- ✅ No secrets found in codebase
- ✅ No .env files in repository
- ✅ Default credentials are documented as development-only
- ✅ Security policy added for responsible disclosure
- ✅ Production security requirements documented

## License
This project is now licensed under the MIT License, making it freely
available for use, modification, and distribution.

All default credentials \(database: sailor/sailor123, admin: admin@sailor.com\)
are clearly marked as development-only and must be changed for production use.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
